products.name: Notion AI
products.tagline: Your connected AI assistant for docs, projects & knowledge
products.description: Notion AI helps you write, brainstorm, edit, summarize, and more — right inside your workspace. It works across your docs, wikis, and projects to save you time and supercharge your productivity.

products.name: Arc Browser 2.0
products.description: Arc is a Chromium-based browser that rethinks how you organize tabs, spaces, and workflows. Version 2.0 brings Boosts, easels, and a command bar that makes browsing feel like a native app.

products.name: Linear 2024
products.description: Linear is a modern project management tool for teams who build products. It combines issue tracking with beautiful design and lightning-fast performance for a seamless developer experience.

products.name: Raycast Pro
products.tagline: Your shortcut to everything on Mac
products.description: Raycast replaces Spotlight with a blazingly fast launcher that lets you control tools, run scripts, and manage tasks. Pro adds AI commands, cloud sync, and team collaboration features.

products.name: Cal.com v4
products.tagline: Open source scheduling for absolutely everyone
products.description: Cal.com is the open-source Calendly alternative. v4 introduces round-robin scheduling, team event types, and a powerful workflow engine — all fully self-hostable and free to use.

products.name: Midjourney V7
products.tagline: Next-gen AI image generation with photorealism
products.description: Midjourney V7 delivers a massive leap in photorealism, coherence, and prompt understanding. Create stunning visuals from text prompts with unprecedented control over style and composition.

products.name: Supabase Studio
products.tagline: The open-source Firebase alternative, now with a visual editor
products.description: Supabase gives you a Postgres database, authentication, storage, and edge functions. Studio adds a beautiful visual editor for building schemas, writing queries, and managing your backend.

products.name: Figma Slides
products.description: Figma Slides brings the power of Figma's design tools to presentations. Create interactive, beautifully animated decks collaboratively — no more exporting static PNGs into boring slide tools.

products.name: Cursor IDE
products.tagline: The AI-first code editor built for pair programming
products.description: Cursor is a fork of VS Code with deep AI integration. It predicts your next edit, answers questions about your codebase, and lets you refactor large files with natural language — all locally and fast.

products.name: Resend
products.tagline: Email API for developers that just works
products.description: Resend is a modern email API built for developers. Send transactional and marketing emails with a beautiful dashboard, React email templates, and best-in-class deliverability out of the box.

products.name: Cron Calendar
products.description: Cron is a powerful calendar with deep integrations, keyboard shortcuts, and a beautiful interface. Now part of Notion.

products.name: Framed
products.tagline: AI-powered frame generation for your photos
products.description: Framed uses AI to suggest the perfect frame and environment for your digital art and photography.

products.name: Ghost 5.0
products.description: Ghost 5.0 introduces native search, recommendations, and advanced memberships for modern publishers.

products.name: Tailwind UI
products.tagline: Beautiful UI components by the creators of Tailwind CSS
products.description: A massive collection of copy-pasteable components for building modern web applications.

products.name: Vercel Ship
products.description: Vercel Ship introduces AI-driven optimizations and faster build times for frontend teams.

products.name: Spline Beta
products.description: Collaborative 3D design tool that runs in the browser. Build complex scenes and export to code.

products.name: PostHog
products.description: Product analytics, session recording, feature flags, and heatmaps in one single platform.

products.name: Railway
products.tagline: The easiest way to deploy your code
products.description: Railway automates the deployment process for any language or framework with a single command.

products.name: Excalidraw
products.tagline: Virtual whiteboard for sketching hand-drawn diagrams
products.description: A collaborative, open-source whiteboard with a unique hand-drawn style.

products.name: PlanetScale
products.description: The only MySQL-compatible database that scales with your application without any downtime.

products.name: Auth0 by Okta
products.description: Easily add authentication and authorization to your web, mobile, and legacy applications.

products.name: Loom
products.description: Record quick videos of your screen and cam to share with your team. Async work made easy.

products.name: Miro
products.description: Empower remote teams to ideate, build, and manage together in one infinite workspace.

products.name: Framer
products.description: Design and ship high-performance websites without code. The site builder for designers.

products.name: Retool
products.description: Stop building internal tools from scratch. Build apps that connect to your database or API in minutes.

products.name: Zapier
products.description: Connect your apps and automate workflows. Move data between platforms without writing code.

products.name: Sentry
products.description: Sentry's error monitoring platform helps every developer diagnose, fix, and optimize the performance of their code.

products.name: Twilio
products.description: Build modern communication experiences for your customers with Twilio APIs for SMS, voice, and video.

products.name: Stripe
products.description: Stripe provides all the tools you need to accept payments, manage subscriptions, and scale your business.

products.name: Cloudflare
products.tagline: Connectivity cloud for a faster, safer internet
products.description: Protect your web presence and accelerate performance with Cloudflare's global edge network.

products.name: Hugging Face
products.tagline: The AI community building the future
products.description: Collaborate on models, datasets, and machine learning apps. The GitHub of machine learning.

products.name: Replicate
products.tagline: Run machine learning models in the cloud
products.description: Deploy ML models in seconds with a single API call. Scaling and infra handled for you.

products.name: Weights & Biases
products.description: Track experiments, version data, and collaborate on deep learning projects.

products.name: Anthropic Claude 3
products.tagline: The next generation of AI models
products.description: A more intelligent, fast, and safer AI model for complex reasoning and creative tasks.

products.name: Perplexity AI
products.description: A search engine that provides direct answers with citations, powered by advanced LLMs.

products.name: ElevenLabs
products.description: Convert text to high-quality speech with lifelike voices in any language.

products.name: HeyGen
products.description: Create professional business videos with AI avatars in minutes. No studio needed.

products.name: Runway Gen-2
products.description: The next generation of AI-driven video synthesis. Transform any video with text prompts.

products.name: Tome
products.description: Build full presentations and stories with AI. Drag, drop, and generate in seconds.

products.name: Logo AI
products.description: Create professional, unique logos for your startup using advanced design AI.
